home.heroSubtitle: Create and manage weekly class schedules for remote learning. Share calendars with pupils via links or QR codes, chat in real-time, and share materials — all in one place.
home.weeklyCalendarsDesc: Create beautiful weekly schedules with multiple themes for any audience.
home.easySharingDesc: Invite pupils with a link or QR code. Optional password protection.
home.realtimeChatDesc: Per-event chat threads keep discussions organized and focused.
home.fileSharingDesc: Upload and share PDFs and documents directly within events.

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your class schedules

dashboard.noJoinedCalendarsDesc: Ask your teacher for an invite link to join a calendar.
